nodes.label: AI-generated listing descriptions
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to help me write eBay listings

nodes.label: AI's descriptive quality and appeal
nodes.grounding_span: It can be very descriptive and makes descriptions that really draw attention

nodes.label: AI reliability and honesty
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes it fabricates the whole listing

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: It made the listing process so much faster

nodes.label: AI as competitive advantage
nodes.grounding_span: help someone decide if they want to buy from me or from someone else

nodes.label: AI as inventory sourcing advisor
nodes.grounding_span: ask the AI if this product fits the parameters

nodes.label: Trust and credibility with customers
nodes.grounding_span: cause a return of the item

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: spend less time in each store

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI-generated descriptions that need no changes
nodes.grounding_span: written a very nice description that didn't need any changes

nodes.label: Frustration with AI fabrications
nodes.grounding_span: frustrating when the AI gets it really wrong

nodes.label: Optimism about expanding AI use for inventory sourcing
nodes.grounding_span: I am trying to learn how to do this

nodes.label: Iterative review and adjustment — reads over multiple times while checking against item
nodes.grounding_span: reading it over a few times while looking at the item itself

nodes.label: Opportunity-seeking experimentation — actively looking for new AI strategies
nodes.grounding_span: always looking for new ways to incorporate AI into my everyday business
